_finding: The 2442 pin reproduced verbatim (oracle ROBS=1): self-join same-batch self-break lands LAZY — the higher-salience act fires before the retract. CONVERGED (engine right); boundary row the port must not change.
drl:
rule "RJ"
when
    $a : T2()
    $b : T2(f1 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T3(true, false));
    modify($b) { setF1(true), setF0($a.getF0()) }
end
rule "ROBS"
salience 7
when
    T3()
then
end
name: ird_m3_samebatch_selfjoin_modify
